Event: Mushroom Loot - June 2026
Event Date: 11/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI333
Equinox Crown Ring

The unit's attacks have a 65% chance to poison the target. A poisoned enemy unit receives 375000 magic damage for 4 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 15% every second. Stacks up to 4 times.

Once every 8 sec., the unit poisons 3 random enemy units. Poisoned enemy units receive 375000 magic damage for 4 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 15% every second. The unit also removes 3 random positive effects from each of the poisoned enemy units on the battlefield, and deals physical damage equal to 225% of the unit's attack to them.

Requirements: 98-100
